text: Welcome to ShadowSpeak, your personal English shadowing assistant.
Shadowing is a language learning technique where you repeat an audio source.
You should try to mimic the speaker's pronunciation, rhythm, and intonation.
This app is built to make that practice easier than ever.
On the left side, you can see the YouTube video player.
On the right side, you'll find the interactive transcript panel.
You can select any sentence to start practicing it right away.
Use the Repeat control to loop a single subtitle over and over.
Toggle Shadow Mode to automatically pause the video after each sentence.
This pause gives you time to speak the sentence out loud.
You can also use keyboard shortcuts to control the app with ease.
Keep practicing every day, and watch your fluency grow!
